## Meeting Purpose

[Address concerns about article quality and discuss strategies for improvement in Biologica's content generation process with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent articles (calcium, alcohol) show regression in quality, organization, and adherence to guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [New agentic pipeline with updated writing guidelines to be implemented within a week](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Focus on improving article structure, realistic recommendations, and consistent adherence to content rules](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Team to use successful past articles as benchmarks and refine the process to match that quality](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)

## Topics

### Article Quality Concerns

  - [Liz expressed frustration with recent articles, noting regression since July](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Issues include disorganization, repetitiveness, and inappropriate use of euphemisms](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Specific problems in calcium article: inclusion of previously removed WHO data on kidney stones](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Alcohol article criticized for unrealistic and outdated social recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### Content Generation Process

  - [Matthew proposed implementing new agentic pipelines to improve adherence to guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Team to use recent problematic articles as controls to test improvements](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Balancing act between human readability, SEO requirements, and AI-friendly content structure](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Plan to standardize article format while maintaining SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)

### Writing Guidelines and Artifacts

  - [Current guidelines may be too long, causing LLM confusion](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Proposal to separate general theology of writing from specific rules](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Need for clearer structure: intro (with euphemisms), key takeaways (data-focused), supporting paragraphs, conclusion](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Importance of logical flow and avoiding topic repetition](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)

### Realistic Recommendations

  - [Emphasis on providing culturally relevant and up-to-date advice, especially for sensitive topics like alcohol consumption](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Need to address more complex, cultural articles (e.g., perimenopause awareness on social media) with appropriate voice](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Technical Improvements

  - [Investigation into potential changes in models or pipelines that may have caused quality regression](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Plan to implement stricter adherence to rules, especially regarding supplement risks and controversies](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to fast-track implementation of new agentic pipeline (target: late next week)](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Regenerate control articles (calcium, alcohol) with new pipeline and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Investigate potential causes of quality regression around mid-August](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Add Liz and Brian to Slack for easier async communication during process refinement](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Matthew to review and integrate Liz's feedback into writing guidelines and article structure](https://fathom.video/share/gipcyEKzVHxj6CYFdpXz6CZJLF835TSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
